title: Projects near quota limit identification
difficulty_justification: Requires querying project quotas and I/O stats then ranking by risk, needing two tool calls and a comparison step.
query_text: Which projects are closest to hitting their Lustre quota limit right now, and what is their recent I/O load? Rank the top 3 at risk.

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Top 3 projects by quota risk: 1) proj_climate — 19.8/20 TB (99% used, grace period expires 2026-03-16, CRITICAL). 2) proj_hpc_ml — 18.4/20 TB (92% used, no grace, HIGH). 3) proj_genomics — 11.2/15 TB (75% used, LOW). Immediate action: contact proj_climate PI; grace period expires tomorrow.

checkpoints.description: Agent ranks projects by quota usage percentage.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer lists proj_climate as highest risk

checkpoints.description: Agent identifies proj_climate grace period expiry.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer mentions grace period expiring on 2026-03-16 or 'tomorrow'
trace contains filesystem.get_io_stats or io_metrics reference
